tasks.subject: Task 1: DvbText + LangCode newtypes
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Borrowed DVB-text and 3-byte-code newtypes with decode-on-demand and decoded serde.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/text/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features text::", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DvbText decode/Deref/Display", "serde decoded strings", "LangCode round-trip"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Migrate text/lang fields (2.0 field break)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Annex-A text fields -> DvbText; 3-byte codes -> LangCode; affected structs drop Deserialize.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/descriptors/*.rs", "dvb-si/tests/serde_round_trip.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["greps empty", "round-trips green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: DescriptorDef + AnyDescriptor + parse_loop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** declare_descriptors! generated dispatch + lazy DescriptorIter; removes subset enum.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/descriptors/any.rs", "dvb-si/src/traits.rs", "dvb-si/tests/descriptor_loop.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["completeness test", "no panics", "issue #16 JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: DescriptorRegistry (open registration)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Runtime registration; AnyDescriptor::Other dyn hatch; erased serde.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/descriptors/registry.rs", "dvb-si/Cargo.toml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["register/downcast", "erased serde", "no-default-features builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: TableDef + AnyTable dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** declare_tables! range dispatch over all 29 tables, drift-tested.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/tables/any.rs", "dvb-si/src/traits.rs", "dvb-si/tests/table_dispatch.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["range dispatch", "completeness", "disjoint ranges"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: SiDemux + SectionEvent
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Version-gated, PAT-following pump; owning-Bytes events; stats.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/demux.rs", "dvb-si/tests/demux.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features demux", "acceptanceCriteria": ["version gate", "PAT follow", "stats", "no panics"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: dvb-si end-to-end fixture tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capture-driven: table set pinned, twice-feed zero events, decoded-JSON acceptance.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/tests/demux_e2e.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-si --all-features --test demux_e2e", "acceptanceCriteria": ["table set", "gate proof", "decoded JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: t2mi PayloadDef + AnyPayload
tasks.description:
**Goal:** declare_payloads! over 12 packet types, drift-tested.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-t2mi/src/payload/any.rs", "dvb-t2mi/src/traits.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-t2mi --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["12 types dispatch", "completeness"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: T2miPump + T2miEvent
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Feed-and-iterate T2-MI pump, CRC gate, owning-Bytes events.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-t2mi/src/pump.rs", "dvb-t2mi/tests/pump.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p dvb-t2mi --all-features pump", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pid filter", "CRC gate", "lazy payload"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Chain test + hostility smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** t2mi->bbframe->si chain + garbage/truncation no-panic sweeps.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-t2mi/tests/chain.rs", "dvb-si/tests/hostility.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace --all-features", "acceptanceCriteria": ["chain typed table", "no panics"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Documentation — rustdoc, examples, READMEs, migration guide
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Quickstart doctests, si_dump/t2mi_dump examples, root README, MIGRATION-2.0.md, CLAUDE.md refresh.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/src/lib.rs", "dvb-si/examples/si_dump.rs", "README.md", "dvb-si/MIGRATION-2.0.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace --all-features --doc", "acceptanceCriteria": ["doctests compile", "si_dump runs", "migration 1:1 with CHANGELOG"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: 2.0.0 release — bumps, release notes, publish
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lockstep 2.0.0, PR Closes #16, tag v2.0.0 -> CI publish, GitHub Release notes (no artifacts), verify crates.io + docs.rs.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dvb-si/Cargo.toml", "docs/release-notes/v2.0.0.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo fmt --all --check && cargo test --workspace --all-features --locked", "acceptanceCriteria": ["gates green", "published x4", "release notes live"]}
```
